home.heroSubtitle: Explore breathtaking landscapes, ancient culture, and unforgettable cuisine across China's most iconic cities.
home.featuredCitiesDesc: From the imperial grandeur of Beijing to the spicy streets of Chengdu
home.foodHighlightsDesc: A culinary journey through China's rich and diverse gastronomy
home.whyHistoryDesc: Walk the Great Wall, explore the Forbidden City, and discover ancient wonders.
home.whyCuisineDesc: Every region has its own unique flavors — from Sichuan spice to Cantonese dim sum.
home.whyModernDesc: Experience futuristic skylines, high-speed rail, and cutting-edge technology.
home.whySafeDesc: China is consistently ranked among the safest countries for travelers.
home.planTripDesc: Ready to experience China? Let our AI assistant help you plan the perfect itinerary.
